hero.title: Talk freely. pinguinz.
hero.subtitle:
A free messenger anyone can use.
Build communities with servers and channels.

features.title: Why pinguinz?
features.desc: Communicate freely with an open-source messenger. Everything you need, from 1:1 DM to workspaces.

chat.title: DM & Group Chat
chat.desc: From 1:1 conversations to group chats. Real-time messaging, file sharing, and read receipts.

workspace.title: Workspaces
workspace.desc: Create your own community with servers and channels. Role management and invite codes included.

voice.title: Voice Channels
voice.desc: Voice chat directly in workspaces. WebRTC-based P2P for lag-free calls.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Install plugins, themes, and bots to customize your pinguinz experience.

openSource.title: Fully Open Source
openSource.desc: All code is public. Build it yourself, modify it, contribute back.

platforms.title: Available everywhere
platforms.desc: One app, every desktop. Download for your platform and start chatting.

freedom.title: Freedom
freedom.desc: Use it, modify it, deploy it. No vendor lock-in, no walled garden.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Every line of code is public. See exactly what runs on your machine.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.desc: No ads, no tracking, no data sales. Your conversations stay yours.

vision.title: From v1 to v5, a complete communication platform
vision.desc: Starting with messaging, growing into communities, extension ecosystems, and voice. A free communication platform built together in open source.

about.title: Why another messenger?
about.desc: Most messengers are closed. You can't see the code, you don't know where your data goes, and you can't change anything. pinguinz is built differently.

freedom.title: Freedom
freedom.desc: Anyone can use it, anyone can fix it, anyone can deploy it. That's free software.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: All code is public. See for yourself what's running.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.desc: Your conversations are yours. No ads, no tracking, no data sales.

whyAnother.q: There are so many messengers already. Why build another?
whyAnother.a: Most messengers are closed-source and monetize user data. pinguinz is fully open-source, letting anyone verify the code and use it freely.

openSource.a: The entire client and server code is public on GitHub. You can build it yourself, modify it, and deploy it on your own server.

privacy.a: We don't include ads or analytics trackers. We never sell user data to third parties. Self-host and your data stays entirely on your server.

contribute.a: Open issues on GitHub, send PRs, or create plugins and themes to share. All forms of contribution are welcome.

platforms.a: Currently Windows, macOS, and Linux desktop apps. Mobile and web clients are on the future roadmap.
